THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROUDA GAIL V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $887.82 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $895.82, PLTF OBLIGATED TO HAVE MITIGATED DAMAGES BY HAVING VEH REPAIRED WHEN EARLIER ESTIMATE OBTAINED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
